failures.description: The agent misinterpreted the ProductCatalogSearch output and selected the most expensive listed item instead of the cheapest available item.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The tool call at index 3 returned 11 available electric kettles sorted by ascending price, with item 1240311797 at $137.17 first and cheapest. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer claiming item 2243454707 at $164.46 was cheapest, which contradicts the tool output. This is not an invalid tool call or underspecification; the required evidence was available and was misread.
